name: metro-os
author: Metro Refined Racks
description: Desktop operations system for Metro Refined Racks

scripts.dev: npm run build:electron && concurrently -k "vite" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && vite build && npm run build:electron
scripts.dist:win: npm run dist:win:installer && npm run dist:win:portable
scripts.dist:win:installer: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --publish never
scripts.dist:win:portable: npm run build && electron-builder --win portable --publish never --config.win.artifactName=MetroCommandCenter-${version}-Portable.${ext}
scripts.pack:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win dir --publish never
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
